{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Galactic Union Civil War
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Omega]] fought in the [[Galactic Union Civil War]] against [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“I remember you fighting in the Galactic Union Civil War. You fought against Solstice then, and from everything I know about you, it seems you started before I born.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon events]]
